tests.source_program:
define i16 @rem_euclid_i16_width(i16 %0, i16 %1) {
  %pow2 = shl i16 1, %0
  %rem = srem i16 %1, %pow2
  %cond = icmp slt i16 %rem, 0
  %add = add i16 %pow2, %rem
  %sel = select i1 %cond, i16 %add, i16 %rem
  ret i16 %sel
}
tests.expect_optimized_program:

  %pow2 = shl i16 1, %0
  %rem = srem i16 %1, %pow2
  %cond = icmp slt i16 %rem, 0
  %add = add i16 %pow2, %rem
  %sel = select i1 %cond, i16 %add, i16 %rem
  ret i16 %sel
}
tests.outside_scope_reason: Summary examples use i8 and i32 only; i16 width represents an unmentioned integer size that still matches the optimization pattern

alive2.src:
define i16 @rem_euclid_i16_width(i16 %0, i16 %1) {
  %pow2 = shl i16 1, %0
  %rem = srem i16 %1, %pow2
  %cond = icmp slt i16 %rem, 0
  %add = add i16 %pow2, %rem
  %sel = select i1 %cond, i16 %add, i16 %rem
  ret i16 %sel
}
alive2.tgt:
; ModuleID = '<stdin>'
source_filename = "<stdin>"

define i16 @rem_euclid_i16_width(i16 %0, i16 %1) {
  %notmask = shl nsw i16 -1, %0
  %3 = xor i16 %notmask, -1
  %sel = and i16 %1, %3
  ret i16 %sel
}

----------------------------------------

#2:
  %pow2 = shl i16 1, %#0
  %rem = srem i16 %#1, %pow2
  %cond = icmp slt i16 %rem, 0
  %add = add i16 %pow2, %rem
  %sel = select i1 %cond, i16 %add, i16 %rem
  ret i16 %sel
}
=>
define i16 @rem_euclid_i16_width(i16 %#0, i16 %#1) {
#2:
  %notmask = shl nsw i16 65535, %#0
  %#3 = xor i16 %notmask, 65535
  %sel = and i16 %#1, %#3
  ret i16 %sel
}

tests.source_program:
define i32 @rem_euclid_const_pow2_commuted(i32 %n) {
  %rem = srem i32 %n, 16
  %cond = icmp slt i32 %rem, 0
  %add = add i32 16, %rem
  %sel = select i1 %cond, i32 %add, i32 %rem
  ret i32 %sel
}
tests.expect_optimized_program:
define i32 @rem_euclid_const_pow2_commuted(i32 %n) {
  %rem = srem i32 %n, 16
  %cond = icmp slt i32 %rem, 0
  %add = add i32 16, %rem
  %sel = select i1 %cond, i32 %add, i32 %rem
  ret i32 %sel
}
tests.outside_scope_reason: Summary emphasizes non-constant power-of-two divisors; constant power-of-two with commuted add operands is a different combination not explicitly discussed
